programme.desc: Mt. Fuji Long Trail / Culture Kyle Card arrives at Mount Fuji and begins his hike on the newly designated long trail around the mountain to witness its cinematic beauty.
programme.title: Cinematic Journey

programme.desc: Inner Conflict of the Human Soul The rich and fascinating Edo era of Japan, which was dominated by a deep love for the arts. The traditional woodblock prints called Ukiyo-e blossomed during this period.
programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.

programme.desc: Large-Scale Logistics Facilities Experts shed light on massive logistics facilities with robust structures and advanced seismic isolation systems, making them suitable as evacuation sites.
programme.title: BOSAI: Science That Can Save Your Life

programme.title: Kabuki Kool

programme.desc: Mt. Fuji Erupts: Are We Prepared? Part 1 The eruption of Mt. Fuji could spew 490 million cubic meters of ash over a wide area, including Tokyo. CG and dramatization, based on the latest scientific research, highlight the potential risks.
programme.title: Documentary 360

programme.desc: Gourmet in the Park The filmmakers explore a restaurant, an oasis in central Tokyo, that has influenced Japanese food trends for over 100 years and holds ties to the post-WWII US occupation.

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.
programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.desc: Enoshima Island, Kanagawa Enoshima, a popular tourist destination near Tokyo known for marine sports. It's also an island with spiritual depth and mystical natural scenery. Come along on an unforgettable two-hour journey.
programme.title: The Perfect 2-Hours Guide

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini

programme.desc: Japan's disaster relief; Asia news; business and global current events.

programme.desc: Okayama - Charming Rustic Warmth We travel Okayama in spring, visiting unique places like a city famous for horseshoe crabs, an island with a historical stone quarry, and a temple featuring hundreds of woodblock prints.

Dr. Lisa Heerema Came from a Reformed Christian background, and became interested in the Catholic Church through history, liturgy, and the sacraments, but had many questions, including about the saints.

programme.desc: Understanding Reality David Anders questions atheists, former Catholics and non-Catholics, while answering questions about the Eucharist, the Douay-Rheims Bible translation and the relationship of the Catholic Church to the seven churches mentioned in Revelation.

programme.desc: S01 E04 — Be Other-Centered, Pt. 2 Exploring prioritizing others' interests ahead of one's own; this altruistic choice is crucial to faithfulness in one's daily duties and vocation.

A suave stranger (Cary Grant) helps a chic widow (Audrey Hepburn) stalked by four men looking for loot in Paris.
programme.title: Charade

programme.desc: After Herbert (Jerry Lewis) loses his lover, he gives up women for good. To get over them, he takes a maintenance position at boarding house, but to his surprise, the building caters specifically to single ladies.
programme.title: The Ladies' Man

programme.desc: A San Francisco playgirl (Tippi Hedren) follows a bachelor (Rod Taylor) to Bodega Bay where, for no apparent reason, flocks of birds begin killing the populace.
programme.title: The Birds

programme.desc: Horrible old movies hosted by Dr. Paul Bearer direct from his home, the Tenement Castle.
programme.title: Dr. Paul Bearer's Creature Feature

programme.desc: S01 E29 — Bitter Water When a neighbor agrees to sell his property, the Cartwrights fear the loss of water rights for their cattle.
programme.title: Bonanza

programme.desc: Kipling's boy hero Mowgli (Sabu), lost in the jungle, is adopted by animals and taught how they talk.
programme.title: Jungle Book

programme.desc: Horrible old movies hosted by Dr. Paul Bearer direct from his home, the Tenement Castle.
programme.title: Dr. Paul Bearer's Creature Feature

programme.desc: A poor street cleaner is relentlessly bullied by the people of a small western township, but things change when a ruthless gunfighter rides into the town.
programme.title: Day of Anger

programme.desc: Poor sharecroppers, the Joads leave dust bowl Oklahoma in hope of better luck in California.
programme.title: The Grapes of Wrath

programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir at Temple Square performs songs of hope, faith and inspiration; singing sacred hymns both new and old from around the world as well as uplifting selections from the American songbook.
programme.title: Music & the Spoken Word

programme.desc: A secret agent (Anthony Eisley) and his boss (Wandisa Leigh) check a madman's sabotage of U.S. moonshots.
programme.title: Lightning Bolt

programme.desc: Supercomputer HAL 9000 guides astronauts (Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester) on a trip to find the origins of humans.
programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey

programme.desc: In a society where life ends at age 30, a law enforcement officer known as a Sandman (Michael York) flees with another 30-year-old (Jenny Agutter) when he learns his number has come up prematurely.
programme.title: Logan's Run

programme.desc: A beautiful detective goes undercover to investigate a huge drug ring in Los Angeles.
programme.title: Get Christie Love!

programme.desc: Oscar-winning adaptation of the Broadway hit about an English professor (Rex Harrison) who teaches a cockney merchant (Audrey Hepburn) to be a lady.
programme.title: My Fair Lady

programme.desc: Incompatible friends (Bob Hope, Lucille Ball), taken for granted by their spouses, fall in love after having to spend time alone together.
programme.title: The Facts of Life

programme.desc: A drifter (John Garfield) stops at a Greek diner and helps the owner's (Cecil Kellaway) lusty wife (Lana Turner) become a widow.
programme.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice

programme.desc: A brother (Fred Astaire) and sister (Jane Powell) take their act to 1947 London. Includes Astaire's famous dance on the ceiling.
programme.title: Royal Wedding

programme.desc: Watson (Nigel Bruce) brings in Holmes (Basil Rathbone) on a case of ritual murder at the old Musgrave estate.
programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death

programme.desc: A lovesick attorney (Raymond Burr) tries to trap a murder client (Angela Lansbury) he got acquitted by arranging for her to kill him.
programme.title: Please Murder Me

programme.desc: Burlesque dancer Dixie Daisy is the prime suspect when rival dancers are found strangled with their own stage costumes. Aided by infatuated stand-up comic Biff Brannigan, Dixie must find the killer before she becomes his next victim.
programme.title: Lady of Burlesque

programme.desc: With an ambitious plan, a PR woman and a country-music bandleader turn a Texas truck driver into a rock 'n' roll star.
programme.title: Loving You

programme.desc: Two vaudeville flops (Bing Crosby, Bob Hope) pose as bad guys and join the Klondike gold rush with a saloon singer (Dorothy Lamour).
programme.title: Road to Utopia

programme.desc: The first manned flight to Mars is a flop, so a space official (Hal Holbrook) fakes it Hollywood-style for the public.
programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.desc: An outstanding jazz score highlights this tale of two American musicians in Paris whose lives are changed by tourists.
programme.title: Paris Blues

programme.desc: Two buddies win a car and head for Hollywood to meet Anita Ekberg.
programme.title: Hollywood or Bust

programme.desc: International swindlers are diverted from their sinister dealings when an explosion wrecks the ship they are aboard.
programme.title: Beat the Devil

programme.desc: A Virginia militia captain (Gary Cooper) rivals a Colonial trader (Howard da Silva) for an indentured Englishwoman (Paulette Goddard) around Indians.
programme.title: Unconquered

programme.desc: Two sailors (Frank Sinatra, Gene Kelly) on leave in Hollywood help an actress (Kathryn Grayson) get her big break.
programme.title: Anchors Aweigh

programme.desc: An outlaw is left by his cohorts and girlfriend to be captured after he is wounded during a heist. When he is released from prison, he tracks his old crew to a run-down town and plays a game of cat and mouse with them.
programme.title: Gun the Man Down

programme.desc: An English girl's dream of racing her horse in the Grand National thunders to reality with the help of a former jockey.
programme.title: National Velvet

programme.desc: Dr. Stein (Peter Cushing) and his assistant (Francis Matthews) sew up a new monster, Karl (Michael Gwynn).
programme.title: The Revenge of Frankenstein

programme.desc: Groucho, Chico, Harpo and Zeppo take advantage of hotel guests during the Florida land boom.
programme.title: The Cocoanuts

programme.desc: Friends (Guy Madison, Kim Novak, Brian Keith) join a college student's scheme to rob a Reno casino for kicks.
programme.title: 5 Against the House

programme.desc: The girl (Glynnis O'Connor) next door makes a teen (John Travolta) born with immune deficiencies want to leave his germ-free bubble.
programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble

programme.desc: A reporter hears how an ex-convict (James Caan) and an Indian woman (Stefanie Powers) destroyed an Old West town overnight.
programme.title: Gone With the West

programme.desc: A Supreme Court justice on a duck-hunting foray becomes involved in serious trouble with the citizens in a small town.
programme.title: A Stranger in Town

programme.desc: A naughty little girl (Shirley Temple) dreams she and her brother are sent by a fairy to find the bluebird of happiness.
programme.title: The Blue Bird

programme.desc: An old trucker (Henry Fonda) steals his truck for one last cross-country run, with a madam (Eileen Brennan) and her crew on board.
programme.title: The Great Smokey Roadblock

programme.desc: A missionary (Leo Genn) in Kenya tells a drifter (Cornel Wilde) his uranium-miner brother has been killed by leopard men.
programme.title: Beyond Mombasa

programme.desc: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) pins rustling on a casino owner and his twin brother (Stanley Ridges).
programme.title: Silver on the Sage

programme.desc: Two detective-school graduates (Bud Abbott, Lou Costello) help a framed boxer who can make himself disappear.
programme.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Invisible Man

programme.desc: A retired cat burglar (Cary Grant) sees fireworks with an American heiress (Grace Kelly) on the Riviera.
programme.title: To Catch a Thief

programme.desc: An outlaw (Dean Martin) plans to swap a cavalry colonel's (Brian Keith) wife (Honor Blackman) for a Gatling gun needed to rob a Mexican bandit.
programme.title: Something Big

programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it.
programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors

programme.desc: Brigham Young (Maurice Grandmaison) and a Mormon group face persecution as they look to settle.
programme.title: Savage Journey

programme.desc: Count Alucard comes out of a lake in his coffin and makes a Southern belle his bride.
programme.title: Son of Dracula

In the wake of the Portuguese Inquisition, on April 19, 1506, a three-day-long massacre led to the slaughter of 3,000 Jews in Lisbon. The fires shot as high as houses, in a city filled with quartered bodies and heads paraded on the points of spears.
programme.title: 1506 - The Lisbon Genocide

programme.desc: Exploring the abduction of 2,000 Jewish children in Portugal following their expulsion from Spain and arrival in Portugal in 1492, an unresolved chapter that still haunts the Jewish community today. Produced by the Jewish Community of Porto.
programme.title: 2,000 Kidnapped Jewish Children

programme.desc: In 1896 a Portuguese army captain founds the Jewish community of Oporto in northern Portugal.
programme.title: Sefarad

programme.desc: In the wake of the Portuguese Inquisition, on April 19, 1506, a three-day-long massacre led to the slaughter of 3,000 Jews in Lisbon. The fires shot as high as houses, in a city filled with quartered bodies and heads paraded on the points of spears.
programme.title: 1506 - The Lisbon Genocide

programme.desc: Exploring the abduction of 2,000 Jewish children in Portugal following their expulsion from Spain and arrival in Portugal in 1492, an unresolved chapter that still haunts the Jewish community today. Produced by the Jewish Community of Porto.
programme.title: 2,000 Kidnapped Jewish Children

programme.desc: In 1896 a Portuguese army captain founds the Jewish community of Oporto in northern Portugal.
programme.title: Sefarad

programme.desc: S03 E06 — Young Javien Mature beyond his years, Young Javien is looking for someone to keep up with his high energy lifestyle; buddies Bunny, Linda, and SJ pull some strings and find Javien three ladies that could be the perfect high-energy match.
programme.title: Bubbies Know Best

programme.desc: S03 E307 — Thrill Seeker Paul Paul is a thrill seeker who wants to find love fast with someone that also enjoys the active lifestyle; Bugs Bunny, Linda and SJ have some ideas to help Paul find his one true, thrill-seeking love.
programme.title: Bubbies Know Best

programme.desc: S01 E06 — David Bugs Bunny, Linda and S.J. select the perfect date for 20-something David.
programme.title: Bubbies Know Best

programme.desc: S01 E07 — 20-Something Max Bugs Bunny, Linda and S.J. look for the perfect date for Max; Erin Davis hosts.
programme.title: Bubbies Know Best

programme.desc: S01 E15 — Cope, Zumock & Miller From Side Splitters Comedy Club in Tampa, join Chris Cope and Chad Zumock from Comedy Central.
programme.title: LMAO

programme.desc: S01 E16 — Cope, Curry & Siebold Chris Cope welcomes multi-comedy award winner JJ Curry and Devin Siebold.
programme.title: LMAO

programme.desc: S01 E17 — Clark, Hicken & Paris Host Skip Clark welcomes comic and podcast host Ricky Hicken; veteran comic Rio Paris.
programme.title: LMAO

programme.desc: S01 E18 — Clark, Hortman & Carter Host Skip Clark brings Rahn Hortman to the stage; laughing along with comedian Matt Carter.
programme.title: LMAO

programme.desc: Israeli Identity, Western Wall, Mahane Yehuda Market Unpacking Israeli Identity, the Western Wall, and the Mahane Yehuda Market in Jerusalem. For Children and Families.
programme.title: Unpacked Jr

programme.desc: S03 E14 — Shabbat On Shabbat there are chances for more blessings; candles, challah, grape juice, blessing the children, blessing the woman of the home and more; Hebrew word of the day is mesibah meaning party; the instrument of the day is the basket shaker.
programme.title: Rhythm 'N Ruach

programme.desc: S01 E10 — Yael Eckstein Hosts Steven Paul, Jon Voight, and Pastors Phil & Tammy Hotsenpiller speak with Yael Eckstein, the CEO of the International Fellowship of Christians and Jews, about the deep bonds between these two great Abrahamic faiths.
programme.title: Friends of Israel

programme.desc: S02 E02 — Chabad in Sydney, Australia Hosts Jon Voight, Steven Paul, Rabbi Levi Cunin, and Rabbi Chaim Cunin dive down under to Sydney, Australia, to connect with Rebbetzin Fruma Schapiro and discuss her mission from the Rebbe himself to enrich Jewish life in her community.
programme.title: Friends of Chabad

programme.desc: Fashionista Emanuelle Kadosh chats it up with Israeli dermatologist Dr. Lehavit Akerman, fashion designer Rachel Zohar, ILTV anchor and artist Aaron Poris, and Noury Lizarraga and Adi Caspi for Hot Topic/Off Topic.
programme.title: Israel in Style

programme.desc: Pride, Make-Up and Street Art Emanuelle Kadosh talks with TV Host Liran Notik about his program My Pride Story, Makeup Artist Laura Douieb and takes a tour of Tel Aviv's street art.
programme.title: Israel in Style

programme.desc: Doughnuts! Natasha investigates the love affair Israelis have with donuts; Natalie visits the popular Tel Aviv brunch spot, Dallal; Emanuelle cooks up Tomato Carpaccio with Chef Didi Mazri.
programme.title: Flavors of Israel

programme.desc: Kosher Restaurants In Israel Adi Caspi visits some kosher establishments, including the Bodega Food Truck in Ramat Gan, the Rooftop Restaurant at the Mamilla Hotel in Jerusalem, the Herbert Samuel Restaurant at the Ritz-Carlton in Herzliya, and Roots Restaurant in Akko.
programme.title: Flavors of Israel

programme.desc: An African Safari in Tel Aviv; a Segway ride; restaurant Claro; the Biblical Museum of Natural History.
programme.title: Cruising Israel

programme.desc: Jerusalem Natalie and Max's favorite spots in the Israeli capital city of Jerusalem include the Jerusalem Botanical Gardens, the Music Square, the Jerusalem Ropes Course, the Kakadu workshops, restaurant The Eucalyptus and the Templer Inn.
programme.title: Cruising Israel

programme.desc: The Birth of Samson Samson was born during a tense time in Israel's history, when the nation was at war with its enemy, the Philistines. Samson's parents had been having a hard time conceiving. We meet the angel who bore good news, and learn G-d blesses Samson.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: Samson Goes to Timnah Samson grows up and is attracted to the ways of the Philistines. He goes to Timnah, marries a Philistine woman, and remains among them until his death in the Philistine Temple.
programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: Tevya Heller is on a cultural journey in search of God.
programme.title: Oh My God!: Religions of the World

programme.desc: At a Nazi death camp in 1944, Jewish prisoners (David Arquette, Daniel Benzali, Steve Buscemi) prepare victims for the gas chamber, then revolt.
programme.title: The Grey Zone

programme.desc: Life after October 7th from the perspective of six filmmakers, graduates of Southern Israel's Sapir College and residents of the Gaza Envelope, who woke up on October 7th to face a day that would change the course of their lives forever.
programme.title: Ext.Day.Saturday

programme.desc: Features, profiles and investigative reports.
programme.title: Business Nation

programme.desc: S01 E06 — Off the Derech Host Frieda Vizel speaks with Pearl, a married Hasidic woman in the Williamsburg neighborhood in Brooklyn, about the practice of Hasidic women shaving their heads and off the derech, individuals who leave the Hasidic Jewish community.
programme.title: Tours by Frieda

programme.desc: Elon Gold speaks with Prof. Shai Davidai about his unwavering commitment to protecting Jewish students at the risk of his own job, sharing the realities of Jewish life in today's academic environment post-October 7th, and on his upbringing in Israel.
programme.title: Stars of David with Elon Gold

programme.desc: Daily news from the State of Israel.
programme.title: ILTV News

programme.desc: Weekly review of news items from Israel.
programme.title: ILTV Weekly Review

programme.desc: S03 E05 — Episode 5 With Doron and his team close on their heels, a desperate Bashar and Jihad follow a bold plan to elude capture.
programme.title: Fauda
